channel.title: MFA on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in MFA on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1202): Security
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Security" , "Malware" , "Wireless Security" , "Windows Security" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Social Engineering" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security for the CompTIA A+ 220-1202 Core 2 exam. Learn physical and logical security, Windows security settings, wireless protocols, malware, social engineering, and hardening.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Operations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Operations" , "Incident Response" , "Identity Management" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Automation" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "SIEM" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security operations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn secure baselines, asset management, vulnerability management, monitoring, IAM, automation, and incident response.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Identity Management" , "Access Control" , "Authentication" , "Federation" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "RBAC" , "MFA" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Identity and Access Management for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn physical and logical access control, authentication strategy, federation, authorization models, and the identity lifecycle.

item.title: Azure Security Center: Secure Your Cloud Environment with Confidence
item.category: "Azure" , "Security Center" , "cloud security" , "Azure Sentinel" , "Azure Defender" , "network security" , "identity management" , "data security" , "threat detection" , "threat response" , "MFA" , "RBAC" , "NSGs" , "Azure Firewall" , "WAF" , "Azure AD" , "Azure Information Protection" , "Azure Storage Service Encryption" , "Azure Disk Encryption"
item.description: Learn how to secure your cloud environment using Azure Security Center, with best practices and real-world examples.

item.title: Pros and Cons of Multi-Factor Authentication for Business Security
item.category: "multi-factor authentication" , "MFA" , "business security" , "cybersecurity" , "data protection" , "regulatory compliance" , "user experience" , "phishing" , "brute force attacks" , "technical complexity" , "user resistance" , "smartphones" , "token" , "smart card" , "fingerprint" , "facial recognition" , "voice recognition" , "PCI DSS" , "HIPAA" , "data breach"
item.description: Explore the benefits and drawbacks of multi-factor authentication (MFA) and learn how to choose the right solution for your business security.
